mode.title: Operation Mode
mode.description: Choose 'INGEST' to scrape and upload data, or 'SEARCH' to query your database.

sitemapUrl.title: Website URL or Sitemap URL
sitemapUrl.description: REQUIRED for Ingest Mode: Base domain (e.g., 'nextjs.org') OR direct sitemap URL. The system will auto-discover sitemaps and intelligently find docs/blog/content pages.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: REQUIRED for Search Mode: The question you want to ask.
query.prefill: How do I fix a 401 error?

useSmallLLM.title: Use AI Query Expansion
useSmallLLM.description: If enabled, uses GPT-4o-mini to improve search results by adding relevant keywords.

filterBySource.title: Filter by Source (Optional)
filterBySource.description: Filter search results to only show results from a specific domain (e.g., 'stripe.com'). If sitemapUrl is provided, it will auto-filter by that domain.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl in Ingest mode.

weaviateApiKey.title: Weaviate API Key
weaviateApiKey.description: The API Key for your Weaviate instance (found in Weaviate Cloud Console).

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI API key starting with 'sk-'.
